note: Created config_error_path.rs with 18 tests covering all error conditions: malformed base64 keys (bad chars, wrong length), invalid CIDR (bad prefix, missing prefix, bad AllowedIPs), malformed endpoints (missing port, bad port), missing required fields (PrivateKey, PublicKey, Interface section), structural errors (unclosed headers), and empty config. Each test asserts the specific error variant and validates message content.
